parsed_review.summary: CP00-205 is a descriptor-only DMS permission/audit tail pack (RP06.P02.M05.S11-S20, risk A, 10 units, micro 'Permission And Audit Binding'). Independent read-only inspection (Read/Grep/Glob) confirms registry pack binding, requirements, service descriptor + case set, validators, contract projection, closeout-plan entry, rp06:dms-core validate script, README, and unit tests are mutually consistent and enforce descriptor-only boundaries. Boundaries verified: no runtime lock acquisition, persistence, review/approval/blocked dispatch, rollback/retry, object storage, OCR, search, email, Citation Ledger, or Loop execution; synthetic-only with no real client/matter/document data; no leakage of validation-error detail, lock tokens, persistence payloads, permission decisions, or audit bodies (customer-safe error codes only). Authority boundary holds: Claude is a read-only independent reviewer and not final approver, and enterprise trust is not claimed from local validation (human final approval reserved). Hermes H06 patterns are confined to deterministic evidence-packet/receipt descriptors, not product runtime. The manifest, command-evidence, adjudication, and construction-inspection correctly remain pending and do not over-claim production_ready while this review runs; downstream adjudication, construction inspection, and final closeout validation (npm validation commands + commit) and human approval remain pipeline gates after this read-only verdict. No prior invalid review attempts to reject; readiness auth-preflight passed with well-formed JSON. No P0-P3 findings.
